title: DNS Gateway Resolver Configuration
description: Configuration for the dns-gateway resolver UDP listener filter, the DNS-interception half of the dns-gateway extension set.

domains.description: Domain matchers, each with its own CIDR range for virtual IP allocation.

domain.description: Exact domain ("example.com"), single-level wildcard pattern ("*.example.com"), or a bare "*" catch-all that matches every queried domain.

base_ip.description: Base IPv4 address for virtual IP allocation (e.g. "10.0.0.0").

prefix_len.description: CIDR prefix length (1-32). A /24 gives 256 virtual IPs.

metadata.description: String key-value pairs exposed in Envoy filter state as io.builtonenvoy.dns_gateway.metadata.\<key\>.

fail_open.description: If true, forward queries to upstream resolvers when a CIDR range is exhausted. Default: false (return NODATA, preventing matched domains from leaking to upstream resolvers).
